# omada_mdns_reflector (Resource)

Manages an mDNS reflector rule on the Omada Controller. mDNS reflector rules enable service discovery (AirPlay, Chromecast, etc.) across VLANs. Gateway rules (type=1) reflect mDNS at the router level; AP rules (type=0) reflect at the access point level.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `client_networks` (List of String) List of network IDs where clients discover services (e.g., phones, laptops).
- `name` (String) The name of the mDNS reflector rule.
- `profile_ids` (List of String) List of built-in service profile IDs. Known values: "buildIn-1" = AirPlay.
- `service_networks` (List of String) List of network IDs where services are provided (e.g., TVs, speakers, Chromecasts).
- `site_id` (String) The ID of the site this resource belongs to.

### Optional

- `status` (Boolean) Whether the rule is enabled.
- `type` (Number) The rule type: 0=AP, 1=OSG (gateway). Gateway rules require a gateway device adopted into the site.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the mDNS reflector rule.
